svg.text: Live Issue State — 별도 Git 저장소
💡 Mode is emergent: recipe modules + policy
Epic: TODO / DONE 상태만 허용 (executor = human 강제)
no-change success (exit 0, file change 없음) → FAILED 수렴
Terminal states: DONE, FAILED (completed 필드는 DONE에만)
assertAdapterAllowed() — policy 없이 permissive 동작 금지 (fail-closed)
packages/cli ≠ adapter-cli (entry point vs adapter layer)
색상: 🟣 Vault(보라/dashed) 🟢 Engine(녹색/solid) 🔵 External(파랑/dashed) 🟠 Annotation 🔴 FAILED/금지
실선=전진전이 / 점선=후퇴·분기 / draw.io CLI 미설치 → 수동 SVG fallback (docs/design/README.md 참조)
